hook: East Auckland buyers — the market just shifted and most people haven't noticed yet.
script: If you've been watching the East Auckland market, here's what's happening right now. Auckland Council's new intensification rules mean more properties in Howick, Pakuranga, and Botany are now zoned for development — and savvy buyers are snapping them up before prices catch up. We're talking character homes on large sections that could be worth significantly more in 12 months. First home buyers, investors, developers — this window won't stay open forever. Want to know which streets to watch? Drop a comment or DM me and I'll send you my free East Auckland buyer's guide.
caption: The Auckland Council rezoning is quietly changing everything in East Auckland 🏡 Howick, Pakuranga, Botany — buyers who move now could be sitting on serious equity gains. Are you watching the right streets? Comment 'GUIDE' and I'll send you my free East Auckland buyer breakdown.
call_to_action: Comment 'GUIDE' below or send me a DM to get my free East Auckland buyer's street-by-street breakdown — before everyone else catches on.
